title: senecio glabratus
intro: Senecio glabratus, also known as Groundsel Bush or Cotton Bush, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, providing potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Groundsel Bush can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it accessible for those seeking natural remedies.
